boundaries.title_guess: Bath: Bath Marina, Bristol cycle path

evidence.excerpt: We shan't be coming to Picketts Lock again... we'll stay in a hotel. I now have a portable CD player which makes driving along very pleasant.
Friday 4th May. 2001 5.15. Simon, Charles, Eve + Tonic left with our 3 bikes... for Bath; we want to go on the Bath/Bristol cycle path.

boundaries.mixed_detail: London/Globe/Picketts Lock trip ends on the facing left page A_0290_L; Bath trip starts cleanly at the top of A_0290_R.

evidence.excerpt: After elevenses we left for home. Friday May 25th Peter is 18 today!... Simon, Eve & Charles [Tonic] set off for [Malvern] at 4.45.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Bath trip ends with 'After elevenses we left for home' (Monday May 7th); the Malvern trip starts on the same page at 'Friday May 25th... set off for [Malvern] at 4.45.'

evidence.excerpt: we drove home with Chris Lowe... Sunday We left breakfastless at 6.35 am... dropped them off at the airport at 7.05.
We reached Cambridge at 10.15, & met Richard Holroyd at William's room... punt at St. John's... a village between Cambridge & Newmarket

boundaries.mixed_detail: Malvern trip ends Saturday ('we drove home with Chris Lowe'); the Cambridge/Burwell trip departs the next morning on the same page: 'Sunday We left breakfastless at 6.35 am'.

boundaries.title_guess: Flecknoe (Bush Hill Farm), Oxford Canal villages

evidence.excerpt: Wednesday May 30th We set off for home at 9.50... & arrive at noon. Friday June 22nd. We set off just after 6 for Flecknoe.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Burwell trip ends 'We set off for home at 9.50... arrive at noon' (Wed May 30th); the Flecknoe trip starts on the same page at 'Friday June 22nd. We set off just after 6 for Flecknoe.'

boundaries.title_guess: Normandy: Etretat, Honfleur, D-Day beaches, Caen, Bayeux, Cotentin

evidence.excerpt: we set off home. October 6th Saturday Simon & Eve) set off for Normandy alone. Charles Boarding BC, John Malvern... We go to Guildford to see Di in hospital
On to Portsmouth, where the ferry people had given our tickets... Left the port & camped at D'Antifer, Henqueville... On towards Etretat.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Flecknoe trip ends with cycling at Braunston then 'we set off home'; the Normandy trip starts on the same page at 'October 6th Saturday... set off for Normandy alone.'

boundaries.title_guess: Malvern & Cambridge (half-term, pick up John & visit William)

evidence.excerpt: At 6.15am we started driving home, collecting Tonic + Charles on the way. Saturday 20th October At Noon we went to Malvern... to pick up John... drove to Cambridge.
his room in New Court... we are camping in Cambridge... Tickle Arms

boundaries.mixed_detail: Normandy trip ends with the ferry home ('At 6.15am we started driving home, collecting Tonic + Charles'); a Malvern+Cambridge weekend trip starts on the same page at 'Saturday 20th October... we went to Malvern... drove to Cambridge.' Diary is non-chronological here (Oct date written after the Nov ferry).

boundaries.title_guess: Brown Moss / Prees (plant-buying for the pond)

evidence.excerpt: we decided to break camp & go home... drove home. April 5th 2002 Friday At 6 we left to buy plants for the garden & new pond... Brown Moss ***
around Brown Moss lake. V. pretty... Off to Holly Farm nurseries... We went on to Stapeley Water Gardens.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Cambridge trip ends ('drove home'); the Brown Moss/Prees trip starts on the same page at 'April 5th 2002 Friday At 6 we left to buy plants...'

evidence.excerpt: Off home in hot sun to plant the plants. Friday May 24th 7 Simon, Eve & Tonic left for St. David's.
We drove on to Pembroke Castle... St. David's... Rhosson Gand ***** ... Absolutely fabulous seascape.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Prees/Brown Moss trip ends 'Off home in hot sun to plant the plants'; the St. David's trip starts on the same page at 'Friday May 24th 7 Simon, Eve & Tonic left for St. David's.'

evidence.excerpt: Friday Jan May 31st. 4.10. we 6ft, Simon, Eve, Charles, Tonic. Heavy Traffic... to Malvern. It's the Queen's Jubilee weekend... The drive south to Lyme Regis... Hook Farm at Uplyme

boundaries.mixed_detail: St. David's trip ends on the previous page A_0313_R ('We set off for home, via Tregaron... on our way home'); the Lyme Regis trip starts cleanly at the top of A_0314_L.

evidence.excerpt: Sunday July 7th. At 10.30. Simon, Eve, John, Charles, Kalgin picked up Annie Crews... We parked at Clent & walked around the hills... set off home to watch Wimbledon.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0316_L holds three pieces: the Lyme Regis trip ends ('Tuesday we packed in the rain... arrived home at 1 pm'), then this single-day Clent van picnic (out and home Sunday July 7th), then the France trip departure. The Clent day-trip occupies the middle of the page.

evidence.excerpt: Monday July 29th. Two days after arriving back from Thorperness we have left for France. Simon, Eve, John, Charles. Peter will fly to Lyons
we arrived at Vendeuil south of St. Quentin... we arrived at 7.45 pm Chaumard... a large lake here & a hydro electric dam.

boundaries.mixed_detail: On A_0316_L the France trip departs ('Monday July 29th... we have left for France') after the Clent day-trip and after the Lyme Regis return; the France narrative runs to the end of the window.

open_at_end: France 2002 trip starting A_0316_L continues past this window (still at Cluny/'Clung' on A_0318_R, mid-narrative)
notes: Bundle header lists books A_0256-A_0350 but only spreads A_0289-A_0318 are present, so this is the reported range. Window opens mid-trip on a London/Globe Theatre/Picketts Lock outing (continues_from_previous_window). Internal page numbers ('no') are scrambled/reused across notebooks and were not used for index mapping; entries mapped by place+year against volA_book4_index (2001-2002). Diary is non-chronological around A_0308 (an October Malvern/Cambridge entry written after a November Normandy ferry return). A_0316_L is a triple-content page (Lyme Regis end + Clent day-trip + France start).
